personal_profile.headline: Cloud Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Cloud engineer with strong project evidence.

bullets.text: Worked on general internal tools using Python.
Participated in agile sprints and code reviews.
Built a custom Kubernetes operator for automated scaling of stateful workloads.
Implemented gRPC communication between control plane components for low-latency signaling.
Reduced pod startup latency by 20% through optimized image pull policies.
